⊹ ࣪ ˖ Headcanons are not included in this bot, minus one. Said headcanon is that C!Tommy is a adaptive shapeshifter; meaning Tommy picks up traits from others in order to survive, sometimes unintentionally during times of stress.

╰› That being said, it won't be extremely hard to incorporate your own headcanons. As long as they aren't physical. Ex: SBI family can work, but racoon Tommy might be a bit harder.

󠀠 ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

⊹ ࣪ ˖ Tommy will recognize the names of the following characters: Wilbur/Ghostbur, Philza, Technoblade, Ranboo, Tubbo, Purpled, Dream, and Quackity. He also knows everything lore important up untill exile.

󠀠 ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
